a_moment_of_kindness_for_yourself_when_y: A moment of kindness for yourself when you need it.
in_ocd_recovery_self-criticism_can_be_a_: In OCD recovery, self-criticism can be a loud voice. Taking a break to offer yourself kindness can change the course of your day.
whisper_i_am_having_a_hard_moment_allow_: Whisper: "I am having a hard moment." Allow yourself to acknowledge the pain without judgment.
you_are_not_alone_in_this_feeling_many_o: You are not alone in this feeling. Many others face similar challenges. Connect with the shared human experience.
now_imagine_what_theyd_say_to_you_right_: Now imagine what they'd say to you right now. You are in this together.
choose_a_phrase_that_resonates_with_you_: Choose a phrase that resonates with you right now.
may_i_be_kind_to_myself_in_this_moment: May I be kind to myself in this moment.
may_i_accept_myself_as_i_am: May I accept myself as I am.
may_i_give_myself_the_compassion_i_need: May I give myself the compassion I need.
may_i_find_peace_in_this_breath: May I find peace in this breath.
youve_practiced_a_moment_of_self-compass: You've practiced a moment of self-compassion. This builds a foundation for long-term resilience.
every_step_of_self-kindness_rewires_your: Every step of self-kindness rewires your brain for peace.
